Contact Us

We'd love to hear from you! Whether it's feedback, a bug report, or a suggestion — get in touch.

Get In Touch

Have a question or want to share feedback about our keyboards? Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

Other Ways to Reach Us

  • Email: You can also email us directly using the form above — it will open your default email client.
  • Feedback: Found a bug or have a suggestion? We appreciate all feedback to make our keyboards better.
  • Business Inquiries: For partnership or advertising inquiries, please use the contact form above.

Report a Bug

If you've found a bug or a key that produces the wrong character, please include the following details in your message:

  • Which keyboard (Urdu, Sindhi, or Arabic)
  • Which layout (Standard, Phonetic, AZERTY)
  • Which key was pressed and what character appeared
  • Your browser name and version
